_meta.description: LLM-manual map graph built tile-by-tile from divided region images and rulebook terrain/connection semantics.
_meta.schema_notes: Nodes are land/sea tiles. Neighbor edges encode terrain crossing, rivers, rail, ports/docks, and straits/canals used by RL action masking. Rail-enabled edges include `railroads` with per-rail IDs; nodes include `rail_secondary_edges` to map rail continuity through multi-rail junction tiles.
warnings: This file is manually transcribed from the map image and is intended for iterative RL environment development.
Some IPP and terrain assignments remain best-effort where small labels were visually ambiguous.
